completed_tasks.name: Apply curation + seed regeneration (via SQL MCP)

decisions.decision: Used MCP execute_sql instead of REST API PATCH for profiles table
decisions.rationale: Supabase RLS only has SELECT for anon key on profiles. PATCH returned 200 with [] silently. MCP uses service role, bypasses RLS.
Catalog grew after Phase 12. Script worked correctly on actual DB state.

next_action: Fresh session: /gsd:execute-phase 13 — will skip completed 13-01, detect 13-02 has no SUMMARY, create it, run verifier, close phase.
context_notes: All DB writes complete. 36/36 profiles x5 laptops, 212/212 scores+notes. Remaining work is SUMMARY.md + VERIFICATION.md + bookkeeping only.
